item.title: Are ‘mind children’ the future of reproduction?
item.description: Forget dirty nappies. In Silicon Valley, there's increasing chatter about virtual offspring.

item.title: AI was supposed to prevent downtime. Instead, it’s creating new kinds of outages
item.description: New research suggests AI itself is increasingly becoming the source of costly operational failures.

item.title: AI Savings Misses ‘Should Be Making Executives Uncomfortable,’ Bain Says
item.description: Cost savings from automation are broadly falling short of projections, according to a new Bain & Co. global survey of large companies.

item.title: How is LFUCG using artificial intelligence? Council will review city's AI policy this week
item.description: An existing LFUCG policy broadly outlines acceptable and prohibited uses for artificial intelligence for local government business.

item.title: Prediction: After Intel, This Artificial Intelligence (AI) Semiconductor Stock Could be Next to Secure an Investment From the Trump Administration
item.description: Under Trump, the federal government has used CHIPS Act funds to buy stakes in a number of tech companies.
